core_philosophy.ethos: We go beyond standard compliance by providing proactive foresight and resilient legal strategies.
core_philosophy.approach: Engineering-led financial clarity and litigation-proof frameworks.

services.title: GST Advisory & Compliance
services.details: End-to-end support for Goods and Services Tax, from registration to complex litigation.

services.title: Corporate Retainerships
services.summary: Customized retainership plans for corporates needing reliable indirect tax support.
services.description: The ambit of indirect taxes is widening in breadth and depth. Exemptions are gradually vanishing, more goods and services are being covered in the tax net, and compliance requirements together with departmental enquiries are increasing every day. In such a scenario, corporates require strong and reliable support to provide knowledge, clarity, and solutions.
services.note: GSC's client-friendly approach has consistently been appreciated by retainership clients.

services.title: Tax Structuring / Optimization
services.summary: Holistic transaction analysis to minimize multiplicity and volume of indirect taxes.
services.description: Due to the complexity of tax statutes, many transactions attract multiple indirect taxes. The indirect tax cost in a transaction can range from 5% to 18% of gross turnover. Proper planning helps minimize the multiplicity and volume of taxes, while appropriate structuring can reduce the value subjected to tax and improve credits and incentives.
services.note: GSC's consulting background and focus only on indirect taxes makes it uniquely positioned for efficient tax optimization.

services.title: Opinions / Notes
services.summary: Clear guidance on tax applicability, exemptions, and compliance obligations.
services.description: With GST, indirect taxes are omnipresent in nearly every business transaction. It is important to know the implications beforehand so that vital business decisions can be taken with confidence and undue penal consequences can be avoided.
services.note: GSC provides the right advice at the right time.

services.title: Corporate Trainings
services.summary: Indirect tax training programs that build tax discipline across all levels.
services.description: Developing best corporate practices is essential for tax discipline. Indirect tax corporate trainings help the workforce at different levels gain knowledge and motivation to achieve the highest level of compliance. Adequate training reduces time involvement, avoids chaotic conditions, bridges compliance gaps, and helps prevent unwarranted penalties or loss of credits.
services.note: GSC also explains the various nuances of the subject beyond conceptual clarity.

services.title: Refunds
services.summary: Guidance and field-level support for incentives and tax refunds/rebates.
services.description: There are various incentives and refunds or rebates available under Central and State statutes and schemes. Corporates may need detailed guidance backed by field-level support. GSC provides broad awareness notes, case-specific eligibility studies, and procedural notes to help corporates understand and realize such incentives.
services.note: GSC maintains a high success rate in obtaining refunds through success-based and cost-effective propositions.

services.title: Litigation Support
services.summary: End-to-end support for complex Customs, GST, and Stamp Duty litigation matters.
services.description: Litigations under Customs, GST laws, and Stamp Duty are increasing in number and complexity due to stringent tax provisions, fiddly compliances, and frequent amendments. Such sensitive matters need to be handled by experts. GSC has decades of experience in Indian indirect tax laws and a strong track record in litigation matters.

solutions.title: Pre-litigation support
solutions.description: Identifying probable litigation areas early, highlighting industry-wide issues proactively, and making representations at the enquiry level to avoid disputes.

solutions.title: Litigation strategy
solutions.description: Assisting organizations with cost-benefit analysis, pros and cons of litigation, and choosing the appropriate litigation approach.

solutions.title: Indirect tax litigation support
solutions.description: Providing practical advice, helping litigate matters end-to-end, appointing counsels, briefing them, drafting submissions, following up, and keeping clients updated.

solutions.title: Due diligence
solutions.description: Verifying documentation and current litigation status during mergers, acquisitions, or restructurings, and providing second opinions on court proceedings.

services.title: Multistate GST
services.summary: One-stop GST support across India for multi-location businesses.
services.description: In India, a business entity must take registration in each State from which it makes supplies. As a result, it has to follow various compliances, assessments, appeals, and other activities for each registration. Continuous amendments in the Central GST law and corresponding State GST implementation make compliance difficult for multi-locational companies.
highlights: Tie-ups with local consultants across 50+ locations

services.title: ERP Implementation / Review
services.summary: Indirect tax support during ERP configuration and review.
services.description: Proper compliance, complete integration, real-time information, adequate internal controls, and timely reporting of all units are key objectives of introducing ERP. If configuration is not done with utmost care and planning, it may become a highly paid disaster. GSC supports ERP implementation from an indirect tax standpoint with knowledge of documentation, logical planning, and awareness of risk areas.

services.title: Tax Reviews / Due Diligence
services.summary: Periodical reviews to pre-empt defaults, gaps, and missed credits.
services.description: Laws constantly evolve, and with them the resultant complexities. In the era of increasing compliances and tax disputes, it is essential to pre-empt possibilities of defaults. Periodic reviews help ensure that top management tax policies are implemented at all levels, identify compliance gaps, and explore additional credits, refunds, and incentives.
services.note: GSC's review tools help management rest assured about due diligence and tax optimization.

services.title: Representation to the Government
services.summary: Industry and trade representations for amendments, clarifications, and policy relief.
services.description: At times, policies or confusion in law create undesired impediments to business activities. Instead of dragging the whole industry into disputes, representations should be made to the Government to obtain relevant amendments or clarifications from Tax Authorities. Industry representations are the means to secure such clarifications or changes.
services.note: GSC helps industrial and trade associations present their stands effectively before the Government.

services.title: Customs & Foreign Trade
services.details: Navigating international trade laws, duty structures, and cross-border compliance.

services.title: Strategic Advisory
services.details: High-level consulting for business restructuring and tax optimization with over 20,000 cases handled.

global_reach: Served clients in 10+ countries served globally.
